Test_Scenario: Verify PIPEDA consent screen appears before PII collection
Test_Steps: 1. Launch app 2. Begin registration 3. Observe consent screen
Expected_Result: Consent screen appears before any PII field is shown. Consent flag recorded in DB before data collection begins.

Test_Scenario: Verify only necessary PII fields are collected during registration
Test_Steps: 1. Complete registration flow 2. Note all fields collected
Expected_Result: Only name, DOB, address, partial SIN, and government ID collected. No excess fields present.

Test_Scenario: Verify valid government ID is accepted
Test_Steps: 1. Upload valid unexpired driver's licence 2. Submit
Expected_Result: KYC verification passes. Account moves to active status.

Test_Scenario: Verify valid passport is accepted as identity document
Test_Steps: 1. Upload valid unexpired passport 2. Submit
Expected_Result: KYC verification passes. Account moves to active status.

Test_Scenario: Verify expired government ID is rejected
Test_Steps: 1. Upload driver's licence expired 1 day ago 2. Submit
Expected_Result: KYC verification fails. Error message displayed. Account not activated.

Test_Scenario: Verify ID expired 1 year ago is rejected
Test_Steps: 1. Upload ID expired 12 months ago 2. Submit
Expected_Result: KYC verification fails. Clear error returned. No account created.

Test_Scenario: Verify name mismatch between form and ID is flagged
Test_Steps: 1. Enter name John Smith 2. Upload ID showing John Smyth 3. Submit
Expected_Result: KYC fails with name mismatch error. Account not activated.

Test_Scenario: Verify duplicate account detection blocks second registration
Test_Steps: 1. Register with email already in system 2. Submit
Expected_Result: System rejects registration. Error: account already exists with this email.

Test_Scenario: Verify user aged 17 years 364 days is rejected
Test_Steps: 1. Enter DOB = today minus 17 years 364 days 2. Submit
Expected_Result: Registration rejected. Error: must be 18 or older.

Test_Scenario: Verify user aged exactly 18 years is accepted
Test_Steps: 1. Enter DOB = today minus 18 years exactly 2. Submit
Expected_Result: Registration proceeds. Age validation passes.

Test_Scenario: Verify partial completion recovery — user returns after abandoning step 2
Test_Steps: 1. Complete step 1 2. Close app 3. Reopen app
Expected_Result: Registration resumes from step 2. Previously entered data retained.

Test_Scenario: Verify unsupported file format rejected for ID upload
Test_Steps: 1. Attempt to upload .bmp file as ID 2. Submit
Expected_Result: Error displayed: unsupported file format. Accepted formats listed.

Test_Scenario: Verify valid e-transfer is sent successfully
Test_Steps: 1. Log in 2. Enter valid recipient email 3. Enter amount $50 4. Submit
Expected_Result: Transfer initiated. Confirmation screen shown. Transaction appears in history.

Test_Scenario: Verify e-transfer fails when balance is insufficient
Test_Steps: 1. Attempt to send $500 with balance of $100
Expected_Result: Transfer rejected. Error: insufficient funds. Balance unchanged.

Test_Scenario: Verify e-transfer of $0.01 is accepted (minimum boundary)
Test_Steps: 1. Enter amount $0.01 2. Submit
Expected_Result: Transfer processed successfully.

Test_Scenario: Verify e-transfer of $0.00 is rejected
Test_Steps: 1. Enter amount $0.00 2. Submit
Expected_Result: Transfer rejected. Error: amount must be greater than zero.

Test_Scenario: Verify daily limit of $3000 is enforced
Test_Steps: 1. Send $3000 in one transfer 2. Attempt second transfer of $1
Expected_Result: Second transfer rejected. Error: daily limit reached.

Test_Scenario: Verify transfer of $2999 is accepted (below daily limit)
Test_Steps: 1. Send $2999 in one transfer
Expected_Result: Transfer succeeds. No limit error.

Test_Scenario: Verify transfer of $3001 is rejected (above daily limit)
Test_Steps: 1. Attempt to send $3001 in one transfer
Expected_Result: Transfer rejected. Error: exceeds daily limit of $3000.

Test_Scenario: Verify transfer to unregistered recipient email is rejected
Test_Steps: 1. Enter email not registered in ClearPay 2. Submit
Expected_Result: Transfer rejected. Error: recipient not found.

Test_Scenario: Verify pending transfer can be cancelled before recipient accepts
Test_Steps: 1. Send transfer 2. Cancel before recipient accepts
Expected_Result: Transfer cancelled. Amount returned to sender balance. Cancellation confirmation shown.

Test_Scenario: Verify transfer cannot be cancelled after recipient accepts
Test_Steps: 1. Send transfer 2. Recipient accepts 3. Sender attempts cancel
Expected_Result: Cancel option unavailable or rejected. Error: transfer already completed.

Test_Scenario: Verify special characters in memo field are handled safely
Test_Steps: 1. Enter memo: <script>alert('x')</script> 2. Submit
Expected_Result: Memo saved as plain text. No script execution. XSS attempt neutralised.

Test_Scenario: Verify duplicate transfer detection within 60-second window
Test_Steps: 1. Send $100 to recipient A 2. Immediately send $100 to same recipient 3. Submit
Expected_Result: Second transfer flagged as potential duplicate. Confirmation prompt shown.

Test_Scenario: Verify transaction appears in history immediately after send
Test_Steps: 1. Complete e-transfer 2. Navigate to transaction history
Expected_Result: Transaction visible in history with correct amount, recipient, timestamp.

Test_Scenario: Verify received e-transfer appears in history and updates balance
Test_Steps: 1. Recipient accepts transfer 2. Check balance and history
Expected_Result: Balance updated correctly. Transaction visible in history.

Test_Scenario: Verify cumulative daily limit enforced across multiple transfers
Test_Steps: 1. Send $1500 2. Send $1000 3. Attempt $600
Expected_Result: Third transfer rejected. Cumulative total $2500 + $600 exceeds $3000 limit.

Test_Scenario: Verify daily limit resets at midnight
Test_Steps: 1. Send $3000 on day 1 2. Attempt transfer at 12:01am day 2
Expected_Result: Transfer on day 2 succeeds. Daily limit reset.

Test_Scenario: Verify transaction history displays correct fields
Test_Steps: 1. Complete 3 transactions 2. Open history
Expected_Result: Each transaction shows: date, time, type, amount, recipient or sender, status.

Test_Scenario: Verify transaction history is sorted newest first by default
Test_Steps: 1. Complete multiple transactions on different dates 2. Open history
Expected_Result: Most recent transaction appears at top.

Test_Scenario: Verify transaction of exactly $10000 triggers FINTRAC flag
Test_Steps: 1. Send e-transfer of $10000
Expected_Result: Transaction processed and internal FINTRAC reporting flag set in system.

Test_Scenario: Verify transaction of $9999 does not trigger FINTRAC flag
Test_Steps: 1. Send e-transfer of $9999
Expected_Result: Transaction processed. No FINTRAC flag set.

Test_Scenario: Verify transaction of $10001 triggers FINTRAC flag
Test_Steps: 1. Send e-transfer of $10001
Expected_Result: Transaction processed and FINTRAC flag set.

Test_Scenario: Verify suspicious activity flag triggered on unusual large transfer
Test_Steps: 1. Account with history of $50 transfers sends $9500
Expected_Result: Suspicious activity flag raised internally. User may receive alert.

Test_Scenario: Verify velocity fraud detection triggers on 5 transactions in 10 minutes
Test_Steps: 1. Send 5 transfers within 10 minutes
Expected_Result: After 5th transfer fraud velocity flag triggered. Account review initiated.

Test_Scenario: Verify session expires after 10 minutes of inactivity
Test_Steps: 1. Log in 2. Leave app idle for 10 minutes
Expected_Result: Session expired. User redirected to login screen.

Test_Scenario: Verify session does not expire during active use
Test_Steps: 1. Log in 2. Actively use app for 15 minutes
Expected_Result: Session remains active. No unexpected logout.

Test_Scenario: Verify re-authentication required before viewing full account number
Test_Steps: 1. Log in 2. Navigate to account details 3. Request full account number
Expected_Result: Re-authentication prompt appears before sensitive data is shown.

Test_Scenario: Verify account locked after 5 failed login attempts
Test_Steps: 1. Enter wrong password 5 times
Expected_Result: Account locked. User notified. Unlock via email required.

Test_Scenario: Verify locked account cannot be accessed even with correct password
Test_Steps: 1. Lock account via 5 failed attempts 2. Enter correct password
Expected_Result: Login rejected. Account still locked until unlocked via email.

Test_Scenario: Verify concurrent sessions not permitted
Test_Steps: 1. Log in on device A 2. Log in on device B
Expected_Result: Device A session terminated. User notified of new login.

Test_Scenario: Verify API response does not expose unnecessary PII
Test_Steps: 1. Intercept API response during profile load using Postman
Expected_Result: Response contains only required fields. No SIN, full account number, or raw ID data returned.

Test_Scenario: Verify password field is masked during entry
Test_Steps: 1. Navigate to login screen 2. Enter password
Expected_Result: Password characters displayed as dots. No plain text visible.

Test_Scenario: Verify app does not cache sensitive data after logout
Test_Steps: 1. Log in 2. View account details 3. Log out 4. Press back button
Expected_Result: App does not display cached account data. User returned to login screen.

Test_Scenario: Verify biometric authentication works as login method
Test_Steps: 1. Enable biometric login in settings 2. Log out 3. Use fingerprint to log in
Expected_Result: Login succeeds via biometric. No password required.

Test_Scenario: Verify structuring detection triggers when user sends 3 transfers totalling $10000 in 24 hours
Test_Steps: 1. Send $4000 2. Send $3000 3. Send $3000 within 24 hours
Expected_Result: Structuring flag triggered after cumulative total reaches $10000. Internal alert raised.

Test_Scenario: Verify structuring detection triggers on transfers just below $10000 threshold
Test_Steps: 1. Send $9000 2. Send $900 within 24 hours
Expected_Result: Cumulative total $9900 triggers structuring review flag.

Test_Scenario: Verify single transfer of $9999 does not trigger structuring flag in isolation
Test_Steps: 1. Send single transfer of $9999
Expected_Result: No structuring flag raised. Transaction processed normally.

Test_Scenario: Verify structuring flag resets after 24-hour window
Test_Steps: 1. Send $9500 on day 1 2. Send $500 at 12:01am day 2
Expected_Result: No structuring flag on day 2 transfer. 24-hour window reset at midnight.

Test_Scenario: Verify PEP match at onboarding triggers enhanced due diligence flag
Test_Steps: 1. Register with name matching synthetic PEP test entry 2. Submit
Expected_Result: PEP match detected. Account flagged for enhanced due diligence. Standard activation blocked.

Test_Scenario: Verify non-PEP user onboards without enhanced due diligence flag
Test_Steps: 1. Register with name not on PEP list 2. Submit
Expected_Result: No PEP flag raised. Account activation proceeds normally.

Test_Scenario: Verify sanctioned individual is blocked at registration
Test_Steps: 1. Register using name matching synthetic sanctions test entry
Expected_Result: Registration rejected. Account not created. Internal sanctions alert raised.

Test_Scenario: Verify transaction to sanctioned recipient is blocked
Test_Steps: 1. Log in as valid user 2. Initiate transfer to recipient matching sanctions test entry
Expected_Result: Transfer blocked. Error displayed. Internal sanctions alert raised.

Test_Scenario: Verify non-sanctioned recipient does not trigger sanctions block
Test_Steps: 1. Initiate transfer to recipient not on sanctions list
Expected_Result: Transfer proceeds normally. No sanctions flag raised.

Test_Scenario: Verify dormant account flagged when initiating transfer over $1000 after 90 days inactive
Test_Steps: 1. Use account inactive for 91 days 2. Initiate transfer of $1500
Expected_Result: Dormant account flag raised. Transaction held for review.

Test_Scenario: Verify repeated round-number transfers flagged as suspicious pattern
Test_Steps: 1. Send $1000 2. Send $1000 3. Send $1000 within 1 hour
Expected_Result: After third round-number transfer suspicious pattern flag raised internally.

Test_Scenario: Verify transfer to high-risk jurisdiction triggers additional scrutiny flag
Test_Steps: 1. Initiate transfer to recipient in FATF high-risk jurisdiction
Expected_Result: Transfer flagged for additional review. User may experience delay. Internal alert raised.

Test_Scenario: Verify suspicious transaction report workflow triggers on flagged transaction
Test_Steps: 1. Trigger a suspicious activity flag via velocity test 2. Check internal reporting workflow
Expected_Result: STR workflow initiated internally. Compliance team notified. Transaction held pending review.

Test_Scenario: Verify AML alert cannot be dismissed without documented review reason
Test_Steps: 1. Raise an AML alert 2. Attempt to close alert without entering review notes
Expected_Result: Alert closure blocked. Error: review reason required before dismissal.
